author: Oscar RP (@oscarrep)
usage_notes: CC-BY licensed, low-poly ready, white/black armor ideal for Empire/First Order equivalent faction. Perfect TABS-style silhouette for stormtrooper unit. Requires Blender normalization to match pack color palettes and rig standards.
special_notes: Model is low-poly and game-ready as-is
Already optimized to 3,222 tris - within budget for infantry unit
White and black color scheme matches Imperial aesthetics
Silhouette clearly reads as humanoid soldier at distance
May require UV unwrap adjustment or texture baking for DINO engine
No rig present - suitable for static placement or skeletal setup

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_stormtrooper_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record
